Calculation.Text: SetProperty ( "fat_title_id" ; FAT Title::PrimaryKey ) & SetProperty ( "funkis_cloud_title_id" ; FAT Title::Funkis Cloud Title id ) & SetProperty ( "title_environment" ; FAT Title::Title Environment )
FAT Title::Title isLive Or FAT Title::Title Backend ≠ "Funkis Cloud"
Not FAT Title::Title isLive Or FAT Title::Title Backend ≠ "Funkis Cloud"
IsEmpty (FAT Title::Base project) Or IsEmpty (FAT Package::Local export type) Or notDeveloper
"View all media with subtitles in title"
"View all text styles defined in title"
Case(IsEmpty(FAT Title::gObjectGroup) ; True; FAT IO::Object Group = FAT Title::gObjectGroup) And FAT IO::Insight visible And FAT IO::IO type = "Select" Or FAT IO::IO type = "Rate"
"View all page items using this IO"
1//FAT IO::IO Group = ExecuteSQL ( sqlQuery ; fieldSeparator ; rowSeparator { ; arguments... } )
SetProperty ( "io_id" ; FAT IO::PrimaryKey ) & SetProperty ( "io_type" ; FAT IO::IO type)

StyledText.Data: These are the IOs and IO Fields that you've enabled for Insights. Click Insight eye in IO view to show or hide items in this view.

Calculation.Text: 1//FAT IO::IO Group = ExecuteSQL ( sqlQuery ; fieldSeparator ; rowSeparator { ; arguments... } )
SetProperty ( "io_id" ; FAT IO @ IO Field::PrimaryKey ) & SetProperty ( "io_type" ; FAT IO @ IO Field::IO type)
FAT IO @ IO Field::Name & "¶" & FAT IO @ IO Field::Author description
FAT IO @ IO Field::Name & "¶" & FAT IO @ IO Field::Author description
1//FAT IO::IO Group = ExecuteSQL ( sqlQuery ; fieldSeparator ; rowSeparator { ; arguments... } )
FAT IO @ Text variable::Name & "¶" & FAT IO @ Text variable::Author description
"Remove IO Group - this will NOT remove any IOs"
"This IO group contain " & FAT Object Group::Number of IOs & " IOs."

StyledText.Data: If you have many IOs - Create Groups and assign each IO a group to make authoring easier. Groups are shared between Lists and IOs.
